infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FieldOps uses your location to verify on-site GPS check-in for assigned jobs.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FieldOps uses the camera to capture before/after job photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FieldOps lets you attach photos from your library to a job.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FieldOps uses your location to verify on-site GPS check-in for assigned jobs.

plugins.photosPermission: FieldOps lets you attach photos from your library to a job.
plugins.cameraPermission: FieldOps uses the camera to capture before/after job photos.
